narrative:
Precinct Penn Township (precinct in Morgan County) has 438 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 42.9 percentage points.
